title: T-031 — Reservation create service (RM root only) (WH §9.4)
prompt:
# T-031 — Reservation create service (RM root only) (WH §9.4)

PRD: docs/prd/05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md §9.4
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Implement `createReservation` service for RM root materials only (wo_materials.material_source='stock'). Intermediate cascade (material_source='upstream_wo_output') is hard-blocked (V-WH-FEFO-005). Hard-lock via partial unique constraint.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/reservation-create.ts`: function `createReservation({wo_id, wo_material_id, lp_id, reserved_qty})`.
2. Pre-check: load wo_materials.material_source — if `='upstream_wo_output'`, reject with V-WH-FEFO-005.
3. INSERT into lp_reservations with reservation_type='hard_lock'; rely on partial unique (T-004) for concurrent safety — on conflict return 409 with current holder info.
4. Update LP: `reserved_for_wo_id`, `reserved_qty += reserved_qty`, `status='reserved'`.
5. Emit outbox `lp.reserved`.

## Files
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/reservation-create.ts [create]
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/__tests__/reservation-create.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a stock-source wo_material, when reservation created, then a row in lp_reservations exists, LP.status='reserved', LP.reserved_for_wo_id set, outbox emitted.
2. Given an upstream-wo-output wo_material, when reservation attempted, then service rejects with V-WH-FEFO-005.
3. Given concurrent creates on the same LP, when both run, then exactly one succeeds and the other gets a 409 with `current_holder` info.
4. Given `reserved_qty > (lp.quantity - lp.reserved_qty)`, when called, then service rejects with V-WH-FEFO-004.

## Test strategy
- RED: `apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/__tests__/reservation-create.test.ts` asserting source-gate, concurrency, qty CHECK, outbox.
- Run `pnpm --filter web test reservation-create`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow reservation for upstream_wo_output (Q6 revised).
- Do not bypass partial unique with app-level locking.
- Do not skip outbox.

## Dependencies
- T-004
- T-002
